scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@geti-ai/ui && npm run build --workspace=@geti-ai/smart-tools && npm run build --workspace=@geti-ai/charts
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@geti-ai/ui && npm run test --workspace=@geti-ai/smart-tools && npm run test --workspace=@geti-ai/charts && npm run test --workspace=@geti-ai/mcp
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=@geti-ai/ui && npm run type-check --workspace=@geti-ai/smart-tools && npm run type-check --workspace=@geti-ai/charts && npm run type-check --workspace=@geti-ai/mcp
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@geti-ai/ui && npm run lint --workspace=@geti-ai/smart-tools && npm run lint --workspace=@geti-ai/charts && npm run lint --workspace=@geti-ai/mcp
scripts.docs:dev:with-ui: concurrently -n ui,docs -c auto "npm run dev --workspace=@geti-ai/ui" "npm run dev --workspace=@geti-ai/documentation"
